title: Analytics Dashboard
text: This screen belongs to a product analytics area. It usually shows KPI cards, trend charts, traffic sources, conversion funnels, retention summaries, and date-range filters for business performance review.

title: CRM Contact List
text: This screen belongs to a CRM or customer operations area. It typically contains customer names, company fields, owner assignment, pipeline stage, follow-up status, and bulk actions for sales workflows.

title: Project Kanban
text: This screen belongs to a project management area. It usually includes kanban columns, issue cards, assignees, due dates, priority labels, sprint grouping, and workflow status transitions.

title: Billing Settings
text: This screen belongs to account settings or billing management. It often includes subscription plan details, invoice history, payment methods, seat counts, usage limits, renewal dates, and upgrade controls.
